h2: Importance Electrical Safety Audit for Companies in Mexico

Integrating Safety and Compliance to Future-Proof Your Electrical System
paragraphs: The responsibility of health & safety at workplace rests on shoulders of the employer. Therefore, implementing sound occupational health and safety policies must be prime concern for management to ensure the appropriate control measures and work practices. is a strong sign of your commitment to your worker’s health and safety.

Unsafe working environment are likely to have an impact on productivity by loss of output and lower the employee morale. Apart from these losses, you may be liable for huge fines/penalties for damages.

Carelabs professional electrical safety audit services combine decades long experience with today’s modern technologies providing solutions to the real-world applications. It helps to reduce risk and improve inefficiencies in the workplace environment. We are the professional electrical safety service providing experts to our clients across the global.

Periodic electrical safety audit is the heart of ensuring health & safety of your facility. An Electrical Safety Audit is a systematic approach for evaluating potential electrical hazard risks, produce reports based on the findings, and recommending actions for improving the electrical safety.
Carelabs safety audit includes examining the safety & security of electrical installation of any establishments. It is performed by safety enquiry, testing, inspection and verification process.
Our Electrical Safety Audit and reporting will focus on electrical installation and safe work code of practices at your facility based on the RFSHMAT, NOM-022-STPS, NEC, NFPA 70E, NFPA 70B, and OSHA.

Managing electrical safety risk is important for any establishments. For that, it is essential to have an effective electrical safety management program in workplace. As a part of the program, your facility should have the following in place:
